title: Fix duplicate header rendering

requirements.text: Fix the duplicate header issue where the site header (with the Press Kit navigation link and dark/light mode toggle) appears twice on the page. Audit all layout components, route wrappers, and the App.tsx root component to ensure the Header component is rendered exactly once per page view.
acceptanceCriteria: Only one header is visible on the landing page (/)
Only one header is visible on the press kit page (/press-kit)
The header remains hidden on the /admin route as per existing behavior
No duplicate Header component instances exist in the rendered DOM

constraints: Do not alter the admin principal ID or access control logic
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new navigation items to the header
Changing header behavior on any route beyond fixing the duplication
